title: FIN Bridge Poll Response
description: The body the server returns from a held /fin/v1/poll. Server -> agent. Carries the commands to execute and the server's protocol version (so skew is detectable even on a 200). commands may be empty when the hold expired with nothing queued.

commands.title: Commands
commands.description: Command envelopes for the agent to execute. Possibly empty. Each command's id is unique; the agent dedups on it for at-most-once execution.
